rationale: Captured by running Qwen2_5Model::prefill on the tiny-synthetic Qwen2.5-shaped model defined in crates/models/tests/qwen2_5_tiny_synthetic_prefill.rs (vocab=32, hidden=16, intermediate=32, num_hidden_layers=2, num_attention_heads=4, num_key_value_heads=2, head_dim=4, rope_theta=10000, eps=1e-6) with deterministic synthetic weights generated by the `synth(seed, len)` formula `0.05 * sin(seed * 0.123 + i * 0.0177)`. Tolerance 1e-4 is derived from the depth of the prefill chain (two transformer blocks: RMSNorm + 4 matmuls + RoPE + attention + matmul + residual + RMSNorm + 3 MLP matmuls + silu + residual; final norm + lm_head) plus cross-platform f32::sin/cos/exp drift; see test module docs for the budget derivation. Regenerate by running `cargo test -p ocelotl-models --test qwen2_5_tiny_synthetic_prefill -- --nocapture` with OCELOTL_PRINT_LOGITS=1 and copying the printed values back into this fixture.
